reviews.comment:
buena atencion si tienen que comer haganlo en el full, la parrilla de atras no vale la pena

(Translated by Google)
Good service. If you have to eat, go to the full-service restaurant; the back grill isn't worth it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMWZQMXZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
A mitad de camino entre Mar del Plata y Bs.As. Tiene espacio verde para estirar las piernas, baños limpios, buen café, comidas rápidas. Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Halfway between Mar del Plata and Buenos Aires. It has green space to stretch your legs, clean bathrooms, good coffee, and fast food. Good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBa1lTSUNnEAE
